name: Prefab.Alert

unions.comment: The size of the alert to display

name: Prefab.Button

unions.name: Size
unions.comment: Change the Size of the button

unions.name: Style
unions.comment: Change the Style of the button

unions.name: Variant
unions.comment: Change the Variant of the button

values.name: new
values.comment: Create a new button with a label and an optional onClick message
values.type: { label : String.String, onClick : Maybe.Maybe msg } -> Prefab.Button.Button msg

values.name: view
values.type: List.List (Element.Attribute msg) -> Prefab.Button.Button msg -> Element.Element msg

values.name: withIconLeft
values.comment: Add an icon to the left of the button

values.name: withIconRight
values.comment: Add an icon to the right of the button
values.type: FontAwesome.Icon FontAwesome.WithoutId -> Prefab.Button.Button msg -> Prefab.Button.Button msg

values.name: withLabelHidden
values.comment: Hide the label of the button

values.name: withSize
values.comment: Change the Size of the button

values.name: withStyle
values.comment: Change the Style of the button

values.name: withVariant
values.comment: Change the Variant of the button

values.name: withoutCaps
values.comment: Change the button to not be all caps

name: Prefab.Radio
